# TARDIS Solutions

> TARDIS Solutions builds production-ready GIS systems, AI orchestration platforms, and adaptive learning tools for teams solving complex spatial, intelligence, and education problems.

## Products
- [TARDIS Maps](https://tardis.digital/maps): Search-first geospatial intelligence platform with full-text plus spatial retrieval.
- [Navratna](https://github.com/tardis-pro/navratna): Multi-agent AI orchestration with memory, routing, and deployment workflows.
- [Scribe](https://github.com/tardis-pro/scribe): Content and document pipeline tooling for engineering teams.
- [TARDIS Music](https://music.tardis.digital): Media property in the wider TARDIS ecosystem.

## Services
- [Production Gravity](https://tardis.digital/offerings/production-gravity): 14-day production infrastructure sprint.
- [Failure-First Architecture](https://tardis.digital/offerings/failure-first-architecture): Reliability-first delivery for launch-critical systems.
- [Security Without Theater](https://tardis.digital/offerings/security-without-theater): Practical DevSecOps implementation.
